visual_description: A group of men in suits walk down a dimly lit hallway, their backs mostly turned as they move forward. One man in the foreground looks ahead with a neutral expression, while others are partially obscured or in motion. The scene is framed with warm lighting and architectural details, suggesting an indoor, possibly institutional or office-like setting.
audio_description: The audio features a male speaker with a neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking in Mandarin.
